embeds.title: 🎧 Morimens丨V2.4.1 Radio Drama - Mouchette's Otherworld Investi...
embeds.description:
"Now, how should I act this out..."
"Help me... no, it's not real enough... needs more fear, more despair..."
Just like the dying wails of those survivors.

✦ Mouchette VA：Hasegawa Ikumi
